title: Universal Tool Reeled Solder with Flux Coating 100 Grams 1mm Diameter
description:
The Universal Tool Solder with Flux is ideal for jewelry making and repair, crafts, hobbies and much more! This reeled solder has a 1mm diameter and weighs 100 grams, so you'll be able to fix up that project you've been putting off. The solder is flux coated, which will keep whatever you're working on clean. The solder is stored on a convenient reel so you can easily use more if needed. Make sure to keep one of these in your hobby or crafting tool area!
